title.zh: 01 演示稿生成与导出核查

observation.zh: 7 页结构，无价格、无客户名
observation.en: Seven-slide structure, no pricing, no customer names
PPTX opens and contains seven slides

observation.zh: 数据页有一处正文过长，已缩短为两行
observation.en: Data slide had long body text and was shortened to two lines

observation.zh: 试用期、隐私表述、对外承诺待用户确认
observation.en: Trial period, privacy wording, and external claims need user confirmation

zh: 人工打开 deck-draft.pptx，确认 7 页均可显示且备注不为空。
人工检查 screenshots/cover.png、agenda.png、data.png、closing.png 是否无文字溢出。
en: Open deck-draft.pptx manually and confirm all seven slides display and notes are not empty.
Manually check screenshots/cover.png, agenda.png, data.png, and closing.png for no text overflow.

zh: 演示稿可用于内部评审，不能直接对外发布。
用户需要确认试用期、隐私表述和素材授权。
若要改成正式销售材料，先补真实数据和品牌终审。
en: The deck is ready for internal review, not direct external publication.
The user must confirm trial wording, privacy wording, and asset rights.
To turn it into sales material, add real data and brand approval first.

trigger.zh: 一份 800 字产品说明需要在当天交给团队做内部评审，要求 7 页以内且能导出。
trigger.en: An 800-word product brief needed an internal review deck the same day, capped at seven slides and exportable.

firstSignal.zh: 第一轮生成 10 页，数据页正文在 1440px 预览里溢出。
firstSignal.en: The first pass produced ten slides and the data slide overflowed in a 1440px preview.

doneSignal.zh: 最终 7 页均可打开，四张预览截图无溢出，1 项对外表述保留人工确认。
doneSignal.en: The final seven slides opened correctly, four preview screenshots had no overflow, and one external-facing claim stayed under human confirmation.
